name: off-prompt
description: Off Prompt couch co-op social deduction party game.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,blue "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run build --workspace client && npm run build --workspace server
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run typecheck --workspace client && npm run typecheck --workspace server
